cn.releaseNotes:
（重要！）本次更新后已完成所有苹果4G运存与6G运存手机的适配了，从iPhone11至17都能流畅游戏！
（感谢大家这两个月的等待与支持，我们会继续努力更新内容、做好进一步的效果与优化）

第十四部大型资料片“黑榜风云”第二弹重点内容
资料片特色内容1、全新资料片“黑榜风云”
1、天下英雄谱之“黑榜”（第一期）
“一卷《天下英雄谱》横空出世，列尽武林风流人物”，天下英雄谱之“黑榜”：朔海派教主“丁老怪”、黑沙寨寨主“崔振炀”、十二连环坞当家“鹰眼老七”等黑榜高手登场：
1)解锁跌宕起伏的黑榜风云剧情，获得独特产出！
2)大侠们将有机会与他们一同修炼专属武学，培养独属于你和黑榜人物的天赋、乃至神功秘籍、绝世神兵！
3)与江湖2原有的伙伴、结义、结缘、同门的玩法深度结合，更沉浸式的体验。
4)如同天下英雄谱之“百花谱”一样，我们将以“天下英雄”为核心，逐个资料片的塑造江湖中有血有肉的各类人物（参考古龙先生对角色的塑造）



2、黑榜枭雄并起，绿林豪杰争雄！全新黑榜风云剧情玩法
1)黑沙寨裂旗扬威，十二连环坞暗流绞杀，朔海派炼狱重开！三派枭雄竞逐黑榜魁首，胜者掌生杀大权，败者尸骨无存！新增相关门派全新黑榜剧情及挑战
2)天下三大镖局风云骤起，深陷黑榜漩涡！新增三大镖局黑榜相关恩怨情仇（隐藏剧情，还请大侠自行探索）


资料片特色内容2、新武学、新特效
1)武学新增：十二卷天魔策及其对应大型奇遇探险
2)武学特效：十二卷天魔策全套特效


资料片特色内容3、全新关系与经历玩法
全新关系与经历，根据主角与NPC关系动态生成交互事件和玩法（逐步更新）：
1)主角与NPC情分值达到一定程度会触发隐藏剧情
2)主角受伤严重时会有好友前来相助
3)特殊NPC在队伍或门派中有不同的羁绊效果


资料片特色内容4、全新传闻玩法
更具有江湖味，动态传闻事件与大世界生态、时辰、诸多玩法紧密结合，更多稀有奖励与全局成就！（逐步更新）




【（重要！）暗黑江湖相关优化】
由于我们是首次尝试暗黑打宝模式，我们会根据大家的反馈持续优化刷宝体验。衷心感谢大家这些天在社区和官微群提出的宝贵体验反馈！
1、暗黑江湖数值相关调整：
1)下调了暗黑江湖穿戴装备的属性要求，最高下调至更新前的50%
2)下调了暗黑江湖淮临珠词条属性和经脉洗炼的数值上限，老档已获取的淮临珠和已洗炼的经脉属性不受影响。欢迎大侠们来官微群与我们讨论
3)调整了整体技能减伤叠加上限，从更新前的100%调整为85%

cn.description:
【核心特色：这就是你从未体验过的江湖】

1.  “移动端发货”：独属于你的无缝武侠大世界，真实武林画卷
       无读条世界：告别加载画面！我们打造了一个面积达256丈的无缝大世界——中原、江南、西域、南疆……从熙熙攘攘的古城街区，到人迹罕至的雪山秘境，所有场景皆可自由探索。
       活的江湖：昼夜、真实天气、万物动态（可破坏环境、可拾取万物）。世界不仅仅是背景，更是可交互的阶段。
       无束缚体验：轻功飞跃山河，踏波而行，攀爬峭壁。你的武侠梦，不再受束缚。

（我们的核心是创造一个‘无界’的武侠世界。在这里，地图没有空气墙，探索没有读条，整个世界是连贯、可交互、充满生机的）

2.  “第一代最受欢迎的玩法”：千种武学心法，自由搭配的武侠战斗
       没有僵化的“职业”限制！我们提供了超过数百种内功、外功、轻功、技艺。你可以是刀剑双绝的豪侠，也可以是精通音律、以琴音伤人的雅士，甚至是暗器毒术无双的“邪派”高手。
       武学招式不再是一成不变的关键循环。采用我们“无规则”战斗系统，所有的招式心苦自由搭配、组合，你自己的套路。是追求一击必杀的极限爆发，还是决定组建全场连绵不绝的控制？战斗的策略与乐趣，完全交由你。

3.  “你的江湖”：高自由度的人生，你的选择就是规则
       江湖不是非黑即白。你的每一个抉择都会引发难以想象的“因果链”。救下一个路人，他可能就是你未来宗门的引荐人；偷听一桩秘密，或许会让你卷入颠覆王朝的阴谋。
       可以选择拜入名门正派的恪守门规，也可以加入诡谲魔教随心所欲，更可以做个散人，逍遥自在。甚至可以完全抛开打杀，成为一名富甲天下的商贾、巧夺天工的匠人，也可以悬壶济世的神医。这个世界，认可你的每一种活法。

4.  “多达700万字的文本内容，庞大的玩法量级”：沙盒奇遇，要素隐藏线索
       《下一站江湖Ⅱ》的世界是“活”的。NPC们有自己的生活记录和喜怒哀乐。你可能在悬崖下发现前辈遗骸，学到失传绝学；也可能一碗酒，结交到一位隐世高人。
       大量未在任务列表中标记的“奇遇”事件散落在世界各个角落。探索的回报远超你的想象，真正的宝藏，永远献给最好奇的旅人。

5.  “市井百业，多维度沉浸身份”：技艺百态，感受江湖的烟火气
       江湖不止有武功。我们深入嵌入了当今同类生活技能：采矿、采药、锻造、制琴、象棋、书法、绘画、厨艺……这些不仅仅是赚钱的手段，更是提升角色、解锁特殊剧情和关卡能力的关键。一门技艺的技能，也能让你名动江湖。

【故事背景：游戏基础框架】（持续更新）
700万文字庞大世界观：战国末期，三国、百家、江湖！

1.  角色扮演：
① 多出身多结局，每个主角都是全新体验（当前已将门之子、富家千金、寒门书生、江湖浪子、无名小卒等五大身出300多万字主线剧情接近20个结局）

2.  市井身份：
① 皈依各器皿特色的城井身份独特的对应独立剧情、规则玩法。比如刺客对应青衣楼的门玩法派、以及相关的物品万字独立剧情，突出的悬赏及刺杀玩法等

3.  江湖霸图：模拟经营、骑砍LIKE、世界建造
① 物品可加入各具特色的门派
② 每个派都有自己的独立剧情以及与其他门派的恩怨，比如狂刀门和绝剑门的火烧凌云窟大型剧情
③ 每个门派都有自己突出的突出体系，以及规则：比如少林的从扫地僧至罗汉堂首座，敲钟玩法及铜人阵
④ 每个门派都强调自己的武学、心法体系
⑤ 每个门派都可以模拟经营、占领大世界的比如矿山青楼，并开启对应的经营
⑥ 每个门派都一样骑马与砍杀一样的世界争霸

4.  自由成长：习百家武学，走你自己的江湖

cn.description:
Notteka 是一款专为高效会议而生的AI会议记录应用，帮助你轻松录音、精准转写、智能总结，让会议记录不再是负担。 
  
  核心功能：                                                                                                          
                                                                    
  【实时录音转写】                                                                                                    
  一键录音，AI实时将语音转为文字。支持普通话、粤语、英语、日语四种语言，满足多语言会议场景。
                                                                                                                      
  【AI智能摘要】                                                                                                      
  会议结束后，AI自动生成结构化会议摘要。多种摘要模版可选，快速提炼会议重点、待办事项和决议内容。                      
                                                                                                                      
  【音视频文件导入】                                                
  支持从本地或其它APP导入音频、视频文件，自动完成转写，让已有的录音也能快速变成文字记录。                             
                                                                                                                      
  【AI对话助手】                               
  针对会议内容进行AI对话，快速获取关键信息，追问细节，让会议内容随时可查可问。                                        
                                                                                                                      
  【便捷管理】                                 
  - 会议记录按时间自动分组，一目了然                                                                                  
  - 支持搜索、编辑、分享、复制                                                                                        
  - 文件夹分类管理，井井有条                   
                                                                                                                      
  【多语言界面】                                                                                                      
  应用界面支持简体中文、粤语、英语、日语，适配不同地区用户。                                                          
                                                                                                                      
  无论是工作会议、课堂讲座、访谈记录还是灵感备忘，Notteka都是你的智能会议伙伴。

hk.description:
Genius Scan 是一款可裝入口袋的掃描器。 可隨時隨地快速掃描文件，並能匯出為JPEG或多頁PDF檔案。

*** Apple App of the Week *** 2000多萬使用者 *** 1000多家小企業 ***

將任何文件放在裝置的相機前面：我們的掃描儀應用程式會自動識別背景紙張，裁剪紙張並清理結果。您可以獲得清晰易讀的掃描。批量掃描可讓您在幾秒鐘內掃描數十頁。強大的工具可幫助您組織、共享或歸檔文件。

“下一次出差時別忘了下載一個Genius Scan，可以給自己和會計部門帶來很大方便。” - AppPicker.com

“相機應用不適合對文字進行近距離掃描，但Genius Scan可以辦到。” - 衛報

==企業版== 

 Genius Scan+ Premium Pack： 

 - 開箱即用（無需升級）Genius Scan+ 的所有高級功能（用下方的 + 表示）。 

管理組態： 

 - 部署到由MDM工具管理的設備中
 - 按使用者預先配置部署應用程式設定（例如，設定預設電子郵件位址，WebDAV / FTP 憑據） 
 - 控制使用者可以將文件匯出到哪些應用程式和服務
 - 無廣告

==主要功能== 

智慧掃描： 

 - 檔案檢測和背景移除
 - 失真校正
 - 陰影去除和缺陷清理
 - 濾鏡（黑白，白板，照片） 
 - 批量掃描

 PDF建立和編輯： 

 - 文件合併和拆分
 - 多頁PDF創建
 - 照片和PDF匯入

安全和隱私： 

 - 裝置上文件處理
 + 面容_ID 
 + PDF密碼加密

文件組織： 

 - 文件標記
 - 元數據和內容搜索
 + 自訂命名方案（智慧文件名稱） 
 + 使用Genius Cloud進行備份和多裝置同步（單獨訂閱） 

匯出：

 - 電子郵件
 + Box, Dropbox, Evernote, Expensify, Google Drive, iCloud Drive, OneDrive, OneNote, FTP, SugarSync, WebDAV. 
 + 任何與WebDAV相容的服務，例如Citrix ShareFile、NextCloud，ownCloud、Synology、Yandex。 
 + 自動後台自動匯出

OCR（文本識別）：

 + 文字提取
 + 創建可搜尋的PDF
 + 掃描名片和建立連絡人

==關於我們== 

The Grizzly Labs在法國巴黎市中心開發了Genius Scan。我們製作能夠説明全世界數百萬使用者的應用程式並在品質和隱私方面保持最高標準，我們為此感到自豪。如果您有任何疑問，請通過@thegrizzlylabs聯繫我們。

==定價和法律==

您可以訂閱Genius Cloud進行備份和同步。在這種情況下，Genius Scan的商店會顯示每個訂閱的持續時間和價格，並在購買時更新。訂單確認後，將從iTunes帳戶中收取付款。除非在當前期間結束前24小時內關閉自動續訂，否則訂閱會自動續訂。管理訂閱，禁用iTunes帳戶設置中的自動續訂。

https://www.thegrizzlylabs.com/genius-scan/cloud/terms

hk.description:
Notteka係一款專為高效會議而生嘅AI會議記錄應用，幫你輕鬆錄音、精準轉寫、智能總結，令會議記錄唔再係負擔。

  核心功能：

  【實時錄音轉寫】                                                                                                    
  一鍵錄音，AI實時將語音轉為文字。支援廣東話、普通話、英文、日文四種語言，滿足多語言會議場景。
                                                                                                                      
  【AI智能摘要】                                                    
  會議結束後，AI自動生成結構化會議摘要。多種摘要模版可揀，快速提煉會議重點、待辦事項同決議內容。                      
                                                                                                                      
  【音視頻文件導入】                           
  支援從本地或其它APP導入音頻、視頻文件，自動完成轉寫，令已有嘅錄音都可以快速變成文字記錄。                           
                                                                                                                      
  【AI對話助手】                               
  針對會議內容進行AI對話，快速獲取關鍵信息，追問細節，令會議內容隨時可查可問。                                        
                                                                                                                      
  【便捷管理】                                 
  - 會議記錄按時間自動分組，一目了然                                                                                  
  - 支援搜索、編輯、分享、複製                                      
  - 文件夾分類管理，井井有條                   
                                                                                                                      
  【多語言界面】
  應用界面支援簡體中文、粵語、英文、日文，適配唔同地區用戶。                                                          
                                                                                                                      
  無論係工作會議、課堂講座、訪談記錄定係靈感備忘，Notteka都係你嘅智能會議拍檔。

hk.releaseNotes:
Deeper Knowledge on every view
Each data view now has a "Deeper Knowledge" card at the bottom linking to 1-3 dedicated articles on earthbeat.asv.pt. Want to know why the Schumann resonance sometimes spikes, what the Kp index actually measures, or how geomagnetic storms shape the signal? Tap a link and know more.

Smoother fullscreen image viewing
Pinch-to-zoom in the Aura fullscreen viewer and the Weekly Overview archive now behaves like the Tomsk chart lightbox. Zoom from anywhere you pinch, drag to reframe when zoomed, and double-tap to zoom to a specific spot or reset.


VERSION 3.0 NEWS

Introducing Schumann Aura
A new tab turns the last 24 hours of Schumann resonance into a living visualization: four ribbons of light for the four strongest harmonics, with colour, length, and softness encoding frequency, amplitude, and Q-factor. Share the image as a Story, Post, or Square with one tap, or pin it to your home screen as a 1:1 widget.

GCP 2.0 - Global Consciousness Project, relaunched
The legacy GCP Dot has been replaced by the new Global Consciousness Project 2.0 network. EarthBeat now shows live Network Coherence as a color-coded gauge with Normal / Elevated / High / Very High / Extreme bands, and the Live Data page plots 24h netvar history against the project's current coherence zones.

Tomsk charts now show a local-time axis. See exactly when each burst, amplitude spike, or frequency shift happened in your time zone, without converting from Siberian time in your head. The axis stays aligned when you pinch to zoom into a chart.
hk.description:
"If you want to find the secrets of the universe, think in terms of energy, frequency and vibration."
-Nikola Tesla

KEY FEATURES:

- Monitor Earth's Schumann resonance and space weather in one app
- Customisable widgets for Home Screen, Lockscreen and Control Center
- Real-time aurora prediction with full map view
- Live Data: Real-time numerical readings for Schumann harmonics, Kp index, solar wind, and GCP with 24-hour trend charts (EarthBeat Pro)
- Advanced burst analysis, Tomsk outage detection and notifications (EarthBeat Pro)
- Current Reading Analysis, scientific and spiritual, with 100-250 words every three hours (EarthBeat Pro)
- Weekly Tomsk overview with sharing and archive (EarthBeat Pro)
- Share Card: Share a beautiful social card of the current EarthBeat status in dark or light theme (Pro: all supported languages)

Earth's heartbeat, the Schumann resonance, is generated by approximately 2,000 thunderstorms producing around 50 lightning strikes per second. These create electromagnetic waves circling Earth. Many observe connections between this resonance and collective human consciousness, noting behavioral changes during heightened activity.

EarthBeat tracks the Schumann resonance, visualizes space weather indices including the Kp-Index, solar wind, and X-ray flux, and integrates real-time Global Consciousness Project (GCP) 2.0 data. Network Coherence is shown as a colour-coded gauge across five bands, from Normal to Extreme, with 24-hour netvar history on the Live Data page. A dedicated Schumann Aura tab renders the last 24 hours of resonance as four ribbons of light, one per strongest harmonic, with colour, length, and softness encoding frequency, amplitude, and Q-factor, ready to share as a Story, Post, or Square.

Designed for iOS 17 and later, EarthBeat offers widgets in various sizes. Tomsk and Cumiana widgets show current measurements, the Full Tomsk Chart displays three-day history, and the Forecast Widget covers four frequencies. Aurora Widgets predict northern lights activity, Live Sun Images show six NASA feeds for monitoring solar flares, and the GCP 2.0 Widget displays the current Network Coherence band. A Schumann Aura Widget mirrors the same 1:1 ribbons-of-light visualisation on your home screen.

New features include Enhanced Tomsk Data with Quality Factor, Electromagnetic Background, and frequency forecasts; Complete Aurora Map View; and D-Region Absorption Prediction. Tap any graph for full-screen view with pinch-to-zoom.

EarthBeat Pro subscribers get live numerical readings with 24-hour trend charts, advanced Tomsk burst analysis (10/30/60 minutes), custom notifications, weekly Schumann overview with sharing, 10-week archive for tracking patterns, and the ability to reorder the bottom tab bar to match the way they use the app. Your subscription supports server infrastructure and ongoing development.
Compare measurements from Tomsk Space Observing System and Cumiana VLF Station while exploring Global Consciousness Project patterns. Detailed information enhances understanding of these research fields.

Now available in 9 languages including Simplified Chinese, Japanese and Russian.

If you'd like to see additional data sources or have widget ideas, please get in touch.
All displayed images are copyright-protected and belong to their respective sources indicated in the app.

hk.description:
你在一場船難後，孤身漂流至一座神秘的熱帶荒島。
在這裡，生存是唯一目標。搭建庇護所、製作工具、尋找食物與水源，並深入探索島上隱藏的秘密！ 

■ 簡單操作 
• 點擊即可移動和收集資源。

■ 生存挑戰 
• 僅靠野果無法完全填飽肚子。
• 透過小遊戲捕魚，製作陷阱捕捉獵物，獲取珍貴的肉類資源。

■ 健康模擬系統 
• 維持健康並不容易。
• 健康系統包含：體重、傷口、飢餓、口渴、精力、體溫，乃至蚊蟲叮咬…

■ 建造與升級 
• 收集材料製作傢俱，解鎖新工具和料理。

■ 多變的天氣系統 
• 不同的天氣會限制你的行動，可能打亂你一整天的計畫。

■ 自給自足的田園生活 
• 掌握種植作物與飼養山羊的訣竅，自己製作麵包。

■ 放鬆 
• 自然白噪音。

---------
無內購 · 無廣告

tw.description:
妳還在為照片上不請自來的過客犯愁嗎？
使用照片橡皮擦，有瑕疵的照片瞬間修復，變成完美收藏。
照片橡皮擦可以輕松幫妳去除圖片上的電線、人物、圖標、水印、文字等等雜物，就和拍照壹樣簡單。
照片橡皮擦使用智能算法自動填補受損和缺失的區域，智能填充來到了妳的手機，P圖再也不需要壹臺電腦。
特點：
- 刪除多余的人物
- 擦除照片上的電線
- 擦除臉上的粉刺，黑痣
- 修復有劃痕的舊照片
- 去除照片上意外的移動物體
- 去除照片上的水印、日期等等等等
- 簡單易用

什麽，還有不能完成的其他P圖任務，看看我們的其他軟件，總有壹款能幫到妳：
• 輕松摳圖 - 史上最強摳圖神器.
• 色彩大師 - 改變照片顏色,黑白多彩特效.
• 美圖聚焦 - 虛化背景, 模糊背景, 美化照片, 突出運動健美的妳.
• 奇幻變臉秀 - 制作變臉動畫，照片變視頻，GIF圖片.

給我們壹個評論，幫助我們提高app的功能！

"If you want to find the secrets of the universe, think in terms of energy, frequency and vibration."
-Nikola Tesla

KEY FEATURES:

- Monitor Earth's Schumann resonance and space weather in one app
- Customisable widgets for Home Screen, Lockscreen and Control Center
- Real-time aurora prediction with full map view
- Live Data: Real-time numerical readings for Schumann harmonics, Kp index, solar wind, and GCP with 24-hour trend charts (EarthBeat Pro)
- Advanced burst analysis, Tomsk outage detection and notifications (EarthBeat Pro)
- Current Reading Analysis, scientific and spiritual, with 100-250 words every three hours (EarthBeat Pro)
- Weekly Tomsk overview with sharing and archive (EarthBeat Pro)
- Share Card: Share a beautiful social card of the current EarthBeat status in dark or light theme (Pro: all supported languages)

Earth's heartbeat, the Schumann resonance, is generated by approximately 2,000 thunderstorms producing around 50 lightning strikes per second. These create electromagnetic waves circling Earth. Many observe connections between this resonance and collective human consciousness, noting behavioral changes during heightened activity.

EarthBeat tracks the Schumann resonance, visualizes space weather indices including the Kp-Index, solar wind, and X-ray flux, and integrates real-time Global Consciousness Project (GCP) 2.0 data. Network Coherence is shown as a colour-coded gauge across five bands, from Normal to Extreme, with 24-hour netvar history on the Live Data page. A dedicated Schumann Aura tab renders the last 24 hours of resonance as four ribbons of light, one per strongest harmonic, with colour, length, and softness encoding frequency, amplitude, and Q-factor, ready to share as a Story, Post, or Square.

Designed for iOS 17 and later, EarthBeat offers widgets in various sizes. Tomsk and Cumiana widgets show current measurements, the Full Tomsk Chart displays three-day history, and the Forecast Widget covers four frequencies. Aurora Widgets predict northern lights activity, Live Sun Images show six NASA feeds for monitoring solar flares, and the GCP 2.0 Widget displays the current Network Coherence band. A Schumann Aura Widget mirrors the same 1:1 ribbons-of-light visualisation on your home screen.

New features include Enhanced Tomsk Data with Quality Factor, Electromagnetic Background, and frequency forecasts; Complete Aurora Map View; and D-Region Absorption Prediction. Tap any graph for full-screen view with pinch-to-zoom.

EarthBeat Pro subscribers get live numerical readings with 24-hour trend charts, advanced Tomsk burst analysis (10/30/60 minutes), custom notifications, weekly Schumann overview with sharing, 10-week archive for tracking patterns, and the ability to reorder the bottom tab bar to match the way they use the app. Your subscription supports server infrastructure and ongoing development.
Compare measurements from Tomsk Space Observing System and Cumiana VLF Station while exploring Global Consciousness Project patterns. Detailed information enhances understanding of these research fields.

Now available in 9 languages including Simplified Chinese, Japanese and Russian.

us.description:
REALISTIC TOP DOWN RALLYING! 
Rush Rally Origins combines the classic top down racing action from the original Rush Rally with the highly praised graphics and physics from Rush Rally 3. Take on 36 new and unique stages across the world, each with the ability to change the time of day and weather. Drive over many challenging surface types including snow, gravel, dirt, mud and tarmac!

EXPERIENCE THE RUSH
Race at 60fps (120fps on supported devices) with one of the best car dynamics models to date, highly tuned for Rush Rally Origins to give a more fun top down racing experience. Feel the grip change across different surface types and multiple weather conditions.

WORLD RALLY RACING
Compete in a series of rally championships, race against others in our unique A-B Race mode or hold your nerve and focus on improving your times in the time trial game modes.

REACH THE TOP
Smash stage records to rise-up the global online leaderboards. Download ghosts across 4 different car classes to compare your racing lines against the very best in the world.

UPGRADE YOUR CARS
Unlock and upgrade a selection of classic Rush Rally cars. Use our simple upgrade system to tailor each car to your own specific driving style.

OPTIMISED CONTROLS
A control system designed to work with both touch screens and game controllers allows racing to become more fun and consistent however you choose to play. Including the ability to scale, move and swap buttons to suit your needs.

us.description:
Juicy Realm is a roguelike game with fruits as enemies. It is set in a world in which the line between animals and plants is blurred. It began with the tipping of the food-chain, which forced the humans to establish an outpost and begin an investigation in the region where the first species of mutated plants was discovered. The military has prepared a vast number of powerful weapons, with you leading the vanguard forces to wage this long war.

Subverted Order
“Many years later, when the humans watch as the plants climb up to the top of the food chain, they will be reminded of their own naivety and arrogance…”
Only when all the plants started to evolve into animals, growing limbs and becoming sentient, did the humans realize the threat of those photosynthetic-lifeforms. No one knows how they achieved the state of evolution that took animal lifeforms millions of years to reach in such a short amount of time, and no one knows their ultimate objective. The only thing known for sure is that the humans now face the greatest challenge since they climbed up to the top of the food chain.

Gameplay
As the first explorers of this unknown region, you must strive to venture deep into the enemy hive, defeat all kinds of fruits and arm yourself with various equipment, as well as upgrade yourself with the resources you find in your way.

Game Features
-Rougelite elements such as random terrains, loot drops, and monsters
-Hundreds of special and bizarre weapons and items
-Loads of unique mod enemies and bosses
-10 characters in the roster with unique skills and abilities
-Unique artstyle with rich details

Twitter: /@JuicyRealm
Facebook: @JuicyRealm
Press contact: juicyrealm@spacecangames.com

[Minimum Requirements]

Please make sure you are using devices matching the following requirements. If you are using old devices, the game might not run normally on your device.

iPhone 6S and higher
iPad Air 2 and higher
iPad Mini 4 and higher

A story-driven experience about two doctors traversing backwards through a dying man's memories to artificially fulfill his last wish.

ABOUT THIS GAME
Dr. Rosalene and Dr. Watts have peculiar jobs: They give people another chance to live, all the way from the very beginning... but only in their patients' heads.

Due to the severity of the operation, the new life becomes the last thing the patients remember before drawing their last breath. Thus, the operation is only done to people on their deathbeds, to fulfill what they wish they had done with their lives, but didn’t.

This particular story follows their attempt to fulfill the dream of an elderly man, Johnny. With each step back in time, a new fragment of Johnny's past is revealed. As the two doctors piece together the puzzled events that spanned a life time, they seek to find out just why the frail old man chose his dying wish to be what it is.

And Johnny's last wish is, of course... to go to the moon.

MORE DETAILS
"To the Moon", a story-driven RPG with pixel graphics, was originally developed six years ago for PC by Canadian producer Kan Gao and Freebird Games, his indie game studio.Rights to develop and publish the remastered mobile version of "To the Moon" were acquired by X.D. Network Inc.
The story of "To the Moon" unfolds before players, much like a movie. While the entire game has no battle system and can be completed in a few hours, the compelling story and moving original soundtrack resonated with players worldwide. On top of receiving overwhelmingly positive ratings, "To the Moon" received multiple awards from Gamespot, Metacritic, WIRED, and more, and was nominated for "I'm Not Crying, There's Something In My Eye" in the 2016 Steam Awards.

KEY FEATURES
•	Unlocked 29 new iMessage stickers.
•	Added "Music Box" function, allowing backstage music playing& in-game music downloading(will be enabled automatically after clearing the stage).
•	Added "DIY QR code" function, allowing one-key sharing of player data for playing on different devices.
•	A unique & non-combat story-driven experience
•	Innovative mix between adventure game elements and classic RPG aesthetics
•	Acclaimed original soundtrack that closely ties to the story
•	An espresso execution with zero filler and no time drains

tr.description:
RadarScope is an AMS-award-winning weather visualization tool that empowers meteorologists, public safety officials, storm spotters, and weather enthusiasts to view a full suite of single-site radar data and related severe weather products. Your initial purchase provides professional radar visualization in a fully native app, free from distracting and invasive practices, with optional subscription packages to add even more capabilities.

Whether you’re scanning for a mesocyclone’s tell-tale hook echo, pinpointing the landfall of a hurricane’s eye wall, or identifying velocity couplet, hail spike, or debris ball signatures, RadarScope displays native radar data in its original radial format. You see what the radar sees almost as soon as the radar sees it, with automatic updates every two to ten minutes depending on the radar’s scanning strategy.

Your initial app purchase includes the following:

• Full suite of single-site radar products for the US, Canada, Guam, Denmark, Finland, and Germany
• 6-frame radar loops
• Two built-in providers for radar data
• Tornado, thunderstorm, flash flood, marine, snow squall, extreme wind, tropical, and other warnings in the US
• Selected severe weather warnings in Canada and Australia
• NWS-generated storm tracks with hail, TVS, and mesocyclone attributes
• Inspector and distance tools
• Color palette options for radar data
• AllisonHouse data plan integration
• Spotter Network integration for storm and location reporting
• mPING integration for submitting weather reports to NSSL
• Bundled maps with political boundaries, water bodies, and major highways, optimized for low-bandwidth use
• Support for widgets and complications
• Universal app for Apple platforms, including Apple Watch and Apple TV
• Family Sharing support

RadarScope Pro Tier One is an optional annual subscription that adds more features for tracking severe weather:

• 30-frame radar loops
• Cloud-to-ground lightning strikes
• Severe weather watches in the US and Canada
• Special weather statements in the US and Canada
• Mesoscale convective and precipitation discussions
• SPC convective, tornado, hail, wind, and fire outlooks
• WPC excessive rainfall outlooks in the US
• Local storm reports in the US
• Custom color palette support
• Multi-pane display (2 on phones; 4 on larger devices)
• Family Sharing support

RadarScope Pro Tier Two is an optional annual or monthly subscription that transforms RadarScope into a more complete visualization tool for a larger suite of weather products, including:

• Everything in Pro Tier One
• 50-frame radar loops
• A third provider for US radar data
• NEXRAD Level II radar data for the US with a 30-year historical archive
• Historical NEXRAD Level III, super-res, and non-US radar data with a 30-day archive
• Historical NWS bulletins with a 19-year archive
• GOES East and GOES West satellite products
• NSSL’s Multi-Radar Multi-Sensor (MRMS) products
• NCEP’s Real-Time Mesoscale Assimilation (RTMA) products
• Surface observations
• Atmospheric soundings in the US
• Hail size, hail probability, and azimuthal shear contours with a 30-day archive
• More detailed transportation and satellite imagery maps
• Custom color palette support for GOES, MRMS, and RTMA
• Server-sent events for radar and warning updates
• Cross-platform subscription sharing on up to 5 devices
• Family sharing support

If you choose to buy a RadarScope Pro subscription, it will be charged to your App Store account. The subscription will be auto-renewed within 24 hours prior to the end of the current period at the same price you originally paid. Subscriptions may be managed and auto-renewal disabled via your App Store account settings after the purchase. Once purchased, the subscription cannot be canceled during the active subscription period.

DTN is committed to safeguarding your privacy online. Our privacy policy is available for review at https://www.dtn.com/privacy-policy/

Please visit our web site for more information.

tr.description:
Juicy Realm is a roguelike game with fruits as enemies. It is set in a world in which the line between animals and plants is blurred. It began with the tipping of the food-chain, which forced the humans to establish an outpost and begin an investigation in the region where the first species of mutated plants was discovered. The military has prepared a vast number of powerful weapons, with you leading the vanguard forces to wage this long war.

Subverted Order
“Many years later, when the humans watch as the plants climb up to the top of the food chain, they will be reminded of their own naivety and arrogance…”
Only when all the plants started to evolve into animals, growing limbs and becoming sentient, did the humans realize the threat of those photosynthetic-lifeforms. No one knows how they achieved the state of evolution that took animal lifeforms millions of years to reach in such a short amount of time, and no one knows their ultimate objective. The only thing known for sure is that the humans now face the greatest challenge since they climbed up to the top of the food chain.

Gameplay
As the first explorers of this unknown region, you must strive to venture deep into the enemy hive, defeat all kinds of fruits and arm yourself with various equipment, as well as upgrade yourself with the resources you find in your way.

Game Features
-Rougelite elements such as random terrains, loot drops, and monsters
-Hundreds of special and bizarre weapons and items
-Loads of unique mod enemies and bosses
-10 characters in the roster with unique skills and abilities
-Unique artstyle with rich details

Please make sure you are using devices matching the following requirements. If you are using old devices, the game might not run normally on your device.

iPhone 6S and higher
iPad Air 2 and higher
iPad Mini 4 and higher

A story-driven experience about two doctors traversing backwards through a dying man's memories to artificially fulfill his last wish.

ABOUT THIS GAME
Dr. Rosalene and Dr. Watts have peculiar jobs: They give people another chance to live, all the way from the very beginning... but only in their patients' heads.

Due to the severity of the operation, the new life becomes the last thing the patients remember before drawing their last breath. Thus, the operation is only done to people on their deathbeds, to fulfill what they wish they had done with their lives, but didn’t.

This particular story follows their attempt to fulfill the dream of an elderly man, Johnny. With each step back in time, a new fragment of Johnny's past is revealed. As the two doctors piece together the puzzled events that spanned a life time, they seek to find out just why the frail old man chose his dying wish to be what it is.

And Johnny's last wish is, of course... to go to the moon.

MORE DETAILS
"To the Moon", a story-driven RPG with pixel graphics, was originally developed six years ago for PC by Canadian producer Kan Gao and Freebird Games, his indie game studio.Rights to develop and publish the remastered mobile version of "To the Moon" were acquired by X.D. Network Inc.
The story of "To the Moon" unfolds before players, much like a movie. While the entire game has no battle system and can be completed in a few hours, the compelling story and moving original soundtrack resonated with players worldwide. On top of receiving overwhelmingly positive ratings, "To the Moon" received multiple awards from Gamespot, Metacritic, WIRED, and more, and was nominated for "I'm Not Crying, There's Something In My Eye" in the 2016 Steam Awards.

KEY FEATURES
•	Unlocked 29 new iMessage stickers.
•	Added "Music Box" function, allowing backstage music playing& in-game music downloading(will be enabled automatically after clearing the stage).
•	Added "DIY QR code" function, allowing one-key sharing of player data for playing on different devices.
•	A unique & non-combat story-driven experience
•	Innovative mix between adventure game elements and classic RPG aesthetics
•	Acclaimed original soundtrack that closely ties to the story
•	An espresso execution with zero filler and no time drains

pt.releaseNotes:
Mais conhecimento em cada vista  
Agora, cada ecrã de dados tem um cartão “Mais conhecimento” no final, com links para 1–3 artigos dedicados em earthbeat.asv.pt. Quer saber por que a ressonância de Schumann às vezes dispara, o que o índice Kp mede de verdade, ou como as tempestades geomagnéticas moldam o sinal? Toque num link e saiba mais.

Visualização de imagem em ecrã inteiro mais fluida  
No visualizador Aura em ecrã inteiro e no arquivo de Visão Semanal, o toque para expandir e ampliar (pinch-to-zoom) agora funciona como a caixa de luz do gráfico de Tomsk. Amplie a partir de qualquer ponto do gesto, arraste para enquadrar quando estiver ampliado e dê dois toques para ampliar para um ponto específico ou para reiniciar.

NOTÍCIAS DA VERSÃO 3.0

Apresentando Schumann Aura  
Um novo separador transforma as últimas 24 horas da ressonância de Schumann numa visualização viva: quatro faixas de luz para os quatro harmónicos mais fortes, com cor, comprimento e suavidade a codificar frequência, amplitude e fator Q. Partilhe a imagem como História, Publicação ou Quadrado com um toque, ou fixe-a no ecrã inicial como widget 1:1.

GCP 2.0 - Global Consciousness Project, relançado  
O GCP Dot, legado, foi substituído pela nova rede Global Consciousness Project 2.0. O EarthBeat mostra agora a Coerência da Rede em tempo real como um medidor com cores, nas faixas Normal / Elevada / Alta / Muito Alta / Extrema, e a página de Dados em Tempo Real traça o histórico de 24h do netvar vs. as zonas de coerência atuais do projeto.

Gráficos de Tomsk com eixo em hora local  
Os gráficos de Tomsk agora mostram um eixo de horário local. Veja exatamente quando cada surto, pico de amplitude ou mudança de frequência aconteceu no seu fuso horário, sem ter de converter mentalmente o horário siberiano. O eixo mantém-se alinhado ao ampliar e tocar para ver mais detalhes num gráfico.
pt.description:
"Se quer descobrir os segredos do universo, pense em termos de energia, frequência e vibração."
-Nikola Tesla

PRINCIPAIS RECURSOS:

- Monitorize a ressonância de Schumann da Terra e o clima espacial num só app
- Widgets personalizáveis para ecrã Início, Bloqueio e Central de Controlo
- Predição em tempo real da aurora com visualização total do mapa
- Dados em tempo real: leituras numéricas para harmónicos de Schumann, índice Kp, vento solar e GCP, com gráficos de tendência das últimas 24 horas (EarthBeat Pro)
- Análise avançada de surtos, deteção de falhas de Tomsk e notificações (EarthBeat Pro)
- Análise da Leitura Atual, científica e espiritual, com 100-250 palavras a cada três horas (EarthBeat Pro)
- Visão semanal de Tomsk com partilha e arquivo (EarthBeat Pro)
- Cartão de Partilha: partilhe um cartão social bonito do estado atual do EarthBeat em tema escuro ou claro (Pro: todos os idiomas suportados)

O batimento cardíaco da Terra, a ressonância de Schumann, é gerado por aproximadamente 2.000 trovoadas, produzindo cerca de 50 descargas elétricas por segundo. Elas criam ondas eletromagnéticas que circulam a Terra. Muitos observam ligações entre esta ressonância e a consciência humana coletiva, notando mudanças de comportamento durante períodos de atividade elevada.

O EarthBeat acompanha a ressonância de Schumann, visualiza índices do clima espacial, incluindo Kp-Index, vento solar e fluxo de raios-X, e integra dados em tempo real do Global Consciousness Project (GCP) 2.0. A Coerência de Rede é apresentada como um indicador com cores em cinco faixas, do Normal ao Extremo, com histórico netvar de 24 horas na página de Dados em Tempo Real. Um separador dedicado Schumann Aura mostra as últimas 24 horas de ressonância como quatro fitas de luz, uma por cada harmónico mais forte, com cor, comprimento e suavidade a codificar frequência, amplitude e fator Q, prontas para partilhar como Story, Post ou Square.

Desenhado para iOS 17 e mais recente, o EarthBeat oferece widgets em vários tamanhos. Os widgets Tomsk e Cumiana mostram medições atuais, o Gráfico Completo de Tomsk mostra o histórico de três dias e o Widget de Previsão cobre quatro frequências. Os Widgets de Aurora preveem a atividade das luzes do norte, as Imagens do Sol em Tempo Real mostram seis feeds da NASA para monitorizar flares solares e o Widget GCP 2.0 exibe a faixa atual de Coerência de Rede. Um Widget Schumann Aura replica a mesma visualização 1:1 em fitas de luz no ecrã Início.

Novas funcionalidades: Tomsk com Dados Melhorados com Fator de Qualidade, Fundo Eletromagnético e previsões de frequência; Visualização Completa do Mapa da Aurora; e Predição de Absorção da Região D. Toque em qualquer gráfico para ver em ecrã inteiro com zoom por aproximação.

Os assinantes do EarthBeat Pro recebem leituras numéricas em tempo real com gráficos de tendência das últimas 24 horas, análise avançada de surtos de Tomsk (10/30/60 minutos), notificações personalizadas, visão semanal de Schumann com partilha, arquivo de 10 semanas para acompanhar padrões e a capacidade de reordenar a barra de separadores inferior para corresponder ao modo como utiliza a app. A sua assinatura apoia a infraestrutura de servidor e o desenvolvimento contínuo.
Compare medições do Tomsk Space Observing System e da Estação Cumiana VLF ao explorar padrões do Global Consciousness Project. Informação detalhada melhora a compreensão destes campos de investigação.

Disponível agora em 9 idiomas, incluindo chinês simplificado, japonês e russo.

Se quiser ver fontes de dados adicionais ou tiver ideias para widgets, contacte-nos.
Todas as imagens apresentadas têm direitos de autor e pertencem às respetivas fontes indicadas na app.

CORRIDAS DE RALLY REALISTAS NA PERSPETIVA VERTICAL!
Rush Rally Origins combina as corridas clássicas na perspetiva vertical do original Rush Rally com os gráficos e a física fortemente elogiados de Rush Rally 3. SENTE A ADRENALINA
Corre a 60 fps (120 fps nos dispositivos compatíveis) com um dos melhores modelos de dinâmica de carros até à data, especialmente afinado para o Rush Rally Origins para proporcionar uma experiência de corrida mais divertida na perspetiva vertical. Uma história sobre a viagem de dois doutores através das memórias de um homem moribundo, de modo a realizar artificialmente o seu último desejo.

Mais detalhes
A história de "To the Moon" revela-se diante dos jogadores, assim como um filme. Enquanto o jogo completo não tem sistema de batalha e pode ser finalizado em algumas horas, a atraente história e a trilha sonora original tocante ressoa com os jogadores em todo o mundo. Além de receber grandes classificações positivas, "To the Moon" ganhou muitos prêmios da Gamespot, Metacritic, WIRED, e muito mais, e foi nomeado para "I'm Not Crying, There's Something In My Eye" nos Prêmios Steam de 2016.
"To the Moon", um RPG baseado em história com gráficos em pixels, foi originalmente desenvolvido há seis anos para PC pelo produtor canadense Kan Gao e pela Freebird Games, seu estúdio de jogos indie. Os direitos de desenvolver e publicar a versão móvel remasterizada de "To the Moon" foram adquiridos pela X.D. Network Inc.

Sobre este jogo
Os doutores Rosalene e Watts têm trabalhos peculiares, eles oferecem a chance de viver outra vez, tudo dentro da mente dos seus pacientes.

Devido a seriedade da operação, a nova vida torna-se na última coisa de que os pacientes se lembram antes de respirarem uma última vez. Assim, a operação só é aplicada a pessoas em estado terminal, pare que possam experienciar o que sempre quiseram, mas não conseguiram.

Esta história particular segue a tentativa de completar o sonho de Johnny, um homem idoso. Ao recuarem na sua memória, novos fragmentos do seu passado se vão relevados. Ao unir os acontecimentos da sua vida, os dois doutores procuram descobrir a razão por detrás do seu último pedido.

E o último desejo de Johnny é, claro… ir para a lua.
